headline: Captain Cluck Norris Trains Chickens for Intergalactic Egg Delivery Service
summary: Space hens achieve warp cluck in record time.
fullBody: Captain Cluck Norris of CoopForce One announced the first poultry-powered space fleet. 'These birds don't chicken out,' he boasted as a hen laid an egg in zero gravity. NASA offered collaboration but was told the eggs are already in orbit.
